Name: -1_mother_likes_bad_decorating
Representative_Docs: ["My mother. She listens to the same few albums and hasn't changed her taste in years. Never branches out to listen to new things, and those that she finds are usually a worse version of what came out previously.", 'My mother. Her decoration style is tacky and unappealing to me. She also likes older music and movies that aren’t what I would consider to be good or enjoyably.', '6ix9ine, tattoos on his face, neon color hair and gang   signs. I believe he is the text book definition of bad taste. Also he has his teeth replaced with metal and looks ridiculous.']

Name: 0_taste_bad_poor_think
Representative_Docs: ["Well, I would have to say yes I know someone who I consider to have bad taste. There is a difference though between someone who doesn't know any better versus someone that knows how to act but ignores that fact. Again, to me taste and style are two different animals. Style can change and evolves, I think but taste is more of a character quality.  And I am a huge snob probably lol, although I would never tell anyone or show in any way that I thought someone acted in bad taste or had bad style either way. That would be in bad taste, in my opinion.", 'My brother has a bad taste, he cannot think which food is good and not good with less taste, also he cannot get the good clothes for him as he has a bad taste of clothes.', "I can't think of anyone with poor taste."]

Name: 1_trump_donald_bad_taste
Representative_Docs: ["By contrast, I think that former President Trump has very bad taste. I suspect this based on how consistently lies and how he doesn't seem to respect anyone - including himself.  I imagine that such a man would choose things are many would consider to be vulgar and disgusting.", 'Donald Trump has incredibly bad taste. Hi apartment is hideous. His views and opinions, and approach to life in general, should be the poster child for bad taste.', 'President Donald Trump personified bad Taste. His behavior, his words and actions at times cause one to cringe. A lack of compassion leads him to terrible statements. A disregard to anyone who did not agree with him and his reaction is normally a crass remark.']
